chunks.title: David's Messengers to Hanun
chunks.reason: Narrative of David sending comforters and their subsequent humiliation.

chunks.title: First Battle Against Ammon and Arameans
chunks.reason: Account of the alliance formed against Israel and Joab's tactical victory.

chunks.title: David's Victory Over Arameans
chunks.reason: Narrative of the second battle where David defeats the reinforcements and secures peace.
